title: Transparent Hotbar
description: A simple transparent hotbar that removes visual clutter and gives your game a cleaner, modern look.
body:
This resource pack replaces the default hotbar with a fully transparent version, giving Minecraft a cleaner and more modern feel.
Perfect for players who want a minimal UI, better screen visibility, or a smoother PvP experience.
No extra textures, no performance impact — just a simple, polished transparent hotbar.
